trigger.description: Fires when a painter/contractor contact is tagged for referral outreach

steps.description: Mark contact as in active painter referral sequence

steps.subject: Vehicle relocation for your job sites
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

I'm Elliott with Axle Towing. I'm reaching out to {{contact.company_name}} because exterior painting and contracting jobs have a consistent challenge -- vehicles parked right where your crew needs to work.

We specialize in vehicle relocation for job sites. Before your crew arrives, we can coordinate with the property to post notices and clear any vehicles blocking your work area. If someone parks in the way mid-job, we handle that too.

Your crew gets full access to the work area from day one. No delays, no awkward conversations with vehicle owners, no wasted labor hours.

Would it be helpful to have a towing partner on call for your exterior jobs?

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 0 - Introduce vehicle relocation for contractor job sites

steps.subject: Re: Vehicle relocation for your job sites
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Following up on the vehicle relocation idea for {{contact.company_name}}'s job sites. Here's what other contractors have told us they value most:

1. Advance coordination -- we work with the property to post proper legal notice before your start date
2. Same-day response -- if vehicles show up mid-job, we're there within the hour
3. Full documentation -- photos, timestamps, and reports for the property manager
4. No cost to you -- towing fees are collected from the vehicle owner, not your company
5. AZ compliance -- proper signage and process so there are no legal issues

We've handled jobs where 10-15 vehicles needed to be relocated from a work zone. It's what we do.

Worth a quick conversation about your upcoming {{contact.city}} projects?

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 4 - Detail what contractors value about the service

steps.subject: Need vehicles moved for a job? Call us
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Last note from me. Next time {{contact.company_name}} has an exterior job and vehicles are in the way, save our number -- 480-288-5526.

We can typically clear a work zone within an hour of getting the call, anywhere in {{contact.city}} and the greater Phoenix metro.

And if you work with property managers who need ongoing parking enforcement, we welcome those referrals too.

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 10 - Final low-pressure follow-up with standing offer
